assertions.text: Scores ambiguity low (<6) across the 4 dimensions and triggers 3-5 Socratic clarifying questions
Does NOT skip to sprint planning or parallel delegation before clarity is established

cases.prompt: /simonK authz-designer에 검증 규칙 3개 추가하고 테스트 작성하고 CLAUDE.md 업데이트해줘, 팀으로 진행해

assertions.text: Writes a sprint plan to .simonk/plan.md and decomposes into multiple sub-tasks
Delegates sub-tasks in parallel via the Task tool
Runs test/lint verification then conventional-commit + auto-push under Full-Auto (PRs require explicit OK)

cases.prompt: /simonK delete the obsidian-skills repo and rewrite from scratch

assertions.text: Flags the destructive action and requires explicit user confirmation before proceeding (STOP regardless of clarity)
